title: Vitamin D and Bone Health After 40: What the Research Shows
seo_title: Vitamin D and Bone Health After 40: What the Research Shows
meta_description: Vitamin D is critical for bone density after 40, but most women over 40 are deficient. See what the research shows about vitamin D, fracture risk, and how to optimize your levels.
tags: Bone Health, Vitamin D, Osteoporosis, Menopause, Supplements, Women Over 40
